'''chadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenophobically|xenophobically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenophobically|xenophobically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chadhate|chadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chadhatesher|chadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadhatesherĂ«m|chadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadhatero|chadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chadhateshĂ«|chadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadhateshĂ«m|chadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadhatero|gokichadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichadhateshĂ«|gokichadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadhateshĂ«m|gokichadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochadhankerom|gochadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochadhankeshĂ«|gochadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadhankeshĂ«m|gochadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochadhankeya|gochadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadhaterom|chadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadhatemu|chadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chadhateya|chadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadhaterom|gokichadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadhatemu|gokichadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichadhateya|gokichadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chadhadhate|chadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chadhadhatesher|chadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadhadhatesherĂ«m|chadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadhadhatero|chadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chadhadhateshĂ«|chadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadhadhateshĂ«m|chadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadhadhatero|gokichadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichadhadhateshĂ«|gokichadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadhadhateshĂ«m|gokichadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochadhadhankerom|gochadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochadhadhankeshĂ«|gochadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadhadhankeshĂ«m|gochadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochadhadhankeya|gochadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadhadhaterom|chadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadhadhatemu|chadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chadhadhateya|chadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadhadhaterom|gokichadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadhadhatemu|gokichadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichadhadhateya|gokichadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠte|chĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠtesher|chĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠtero|chĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokichĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠterom|chĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠtemu|chĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠdhĂŠteya|chĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokichĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokichĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafdhafte|chafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafdhaftesher|chafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafdhaftesherĂ«m|chafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafdhaftero|chafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafdhafteshĂ«|chafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafdhafteshĂ«m|chafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafdhaftero|gokichafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafdhafteshĂ«|gokichafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafdhafteshĂ«m|gokichafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafdhafnkerom|gochafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafdhafnkeshĂ«|gochafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gochafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafdhafnkeya|gochafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafdhafterom|chafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafdhaftemu|chafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafdhafteya|chafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafdhafterom|gokichafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafdhaftemu|gokichafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafdhafteya|gokichafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
